channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Putin attends scaled-back WW2 victory parade as worries deepen over Ukraine war
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Putin chides NATO at scaled-back Victory Day parade
- Putin Marks Pared-Down Victory Day Parade in Moscow After Zelensky Gives ‘Permission’
- Putin Marks Pared-Down Victory Day Parade in Moscow After Zelensky Gives ‘Permission’
- Putin chides NATO in speech at scaled-back Victory Day parade
- Putin criticises NATO, defends Ukraine war at subdued Victory Day parade
- Why Russia has scaled back May 9 Victory Parade
- Putin Presides Over Downsized Military Parade as Ukraine War Drags On
- Russia holds scaled-down Victory Day parade as temporary ceasefire takes effect
- Russia will always be victorious, says Putin at scaled-back Victory Day parade
- Scaled-back Victory Day parade held in Moscow
- Army is fighting 'aggressive' NATO-backed force in Victory Day speech: Russian President Putin
- Putin oversees scaled-back Victory Day parade on Red Square
- Putin says Russian army fighting 'aggressive' Nato-backed force in Victory Parade address
- In Victory Day Speech, Putin Says Russia Fighting 'Aggressive' NATO-Backed Force in Ukraine
- Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade
- Putin vows victory in Ukraine and targets NATO at Moscow's scaled-back parade
- Putin oversees Russia Victory Day military parade in Moscow amid tight security
- Vladimir Putin calls Ukraine ‘aggressive’ NATO-backed force in victory parade address
- Putin attends scaled-back WWII victory parade as worries deepen over Ukraine war
- Putin says army fighting 'aggressive' NATO-backed force in Victory Parade address
- Moscow begins scaled-back Victory Day parade as 3-day Ukraine truce kicks in
- At Victory Day Parade, Putin Says Russia Fighting 'Aggressive Force' Backed by NATO in Ukraine
- Putin denounces Nato at scaled back Victory Day parade
- Russia marks Victory Day with scaled-back parade
- FULL VIDEO: Putin's Speech at Victory Day Parade
- A Less Muscular Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability
- Moscow To Hold Scaled-back Victory Day Parade As Ukraine Truce Kicks In
- Russia holds scaled-back WW2 victory parade as worries over war in Ukraine deepen
- Moscow to hold scaled-back Victory Day parade as Ukraine truce kicks in
- A Less Muscular Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability]]>
